zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort於1294年1月出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓時，他的父親Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne32歲，母親Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort30歲。他和Jeanne de Flandres至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1345年9月26日在法國布列塔尼培爾萊享年51歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼培爾萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort于1294年1月出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓时，他的父亲Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne32岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort30岁。他和Jeanne de Flandres至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1345年9月26日在法国布列塔尼培爾萊享年51岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼培爾萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort was born in January 1294, in Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 32 and his mother, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Jeanne de Flandres. He died on 26 September 1345, in Quimperlé, Brittany, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Quimperlé, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort est né en janvier 1294, à Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Jeanne de Flandres. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1345, à Quimperlé, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Quimperlé, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort im Januar 1294 in Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 32 und seine Mutter Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort 30. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Flandres mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. September 1345 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Quimperlé, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Quimperlé, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort è nato il nel gennaio 1294 nel Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Jeanne de Flandres. Morì il 26 settembre 1345, nel Quimperlé, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Quimperlé, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfortが1294年1月にフランスブレタグンモービハンで生まれた時，父Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneは32歳，母Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfortは30歳であった。彼はJeanne de Flandresとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1345年9月26日にフランスブレタグンクインペルルeで51歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンクインペルルeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort(이)가 1294년 1월 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Flandres(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 9월 26일 프랑스 브레타그니 키피를e에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 키피를e에 묻혔다.

mn.January 1294–26 September 1345: 1294 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1345 оны Есдүгээр сарын 26

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort nasceu em janeiro de 1294, em Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Jeanne de Flandres. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1345, em Quimperlé, Bretagne, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Quimperlé, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort родился январь 1294 г. в местности морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Jeanne de Flandres. Он умер 26 сентября 1345 г. в местности куимпирлe, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности куимпирлe, бретагн, Франция.

sm.Bet. 1341–1345: mai le 1341 e o'o I le 1345

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort nació en enero de 1294, en Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Jeanne de Flandres. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1345, en Quimperlé, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Quimperlé, Bretagne, Francia.
